rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10, and the substantive reasoning is unchanged — same praise for full-stack TypeScript/Node/React experience, AI agent work, and multi-language breadth, plus the same core concerns about Nest.js and Kotlin/Java. The only differences (adding Vitest to the Nest.js concern, rewording 'not directly related to the primary stack' as 'non-recent roles') are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise unrelated to the Berlin→Bangalore location change. Nothing keys off the candidate's country or geography.
